details.test: Task 1: Create "Morning Sketching" playlist from short sketching episodes
Task 2: Bookmark beginner portfolio posts with >=5 comments
Task 3: Build 2023 reading list and rename to "2023 Color Theory" (adapted)
Task 4: Follow series with most episodes and enqueue latest
Task 5: Customize homepage feed topics and frequency

Task 9: Bookmark 2 top-rated articles by different authors
